MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Frank Black is present.
Defendant Andre Arceneaux is present.
Attorney Timothy Hass appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of JUN-10-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
